# Release v0.11.3

Released: 2026-03-04

## Changes Since v0.11.2

**Version Bump:** PATCH

### Changes

- fix: run REVM migration tests against pallet-revive dev node (#182) (5e309b5)
- Add local dev node recipe (#179) (136201e)
- Add basic Hardhat contract workflow and related files (#178) (51b136e)
- Add ERC-20 with Hardhat workflow and related files (#170) (ed3f546)


## Compatibility

This release was tested with:
- Rust: 1.91.1
- Node.js: v20.20.0

## Testing

All recipes have passed CI tests.
